_about: Sweep spec for imbe_tune. Each top-level key (except those starting with _) is a VocoderParams field name; its array is the list of values to try. The tool runs the cartesian product of all listed dimensions. Knobs not listed keep their VocoderParams defaults from software_imbe_decoder.h.
_size: 3 x 2 x 2 x 2 = 24 combos. Each combo decodes the whole input .imbe in well under a second, so the full sweep runs in ~10-30 s. The size is chosen so blind_compare.py at 60 rounds gets ~5 judgments per combo — enough for a noisy ranking. For a quick single-knob test, drop all but one dimension.
_centered_on: The current best-known values (fmt_alpha=0.22, fmt_w=5, phase_low_blend=0.85, repeat_amplitude_decay=0.85). Each listed dimension brackets one step above and below.
_other_knobs: Other tunable VocoderParams fields you can add as keys: phase_c_env, phase_w_rand, phase_kernel_d, phase_kernel_gamma, voicing_smooth_taps, uv_to_v_reset, interp_max_l, interp_pitch_tol. Adding any extra dimension multiplies the combo count — keep the total under ~30 if you plan to blind-A/B them.
